main.py: FastAPI application entry point. Initializes database on startup via lifespan context manager. Includes health and auth routers. Provides root endpoint with API info.
core/config.py: Application configuration using Pydantic BaseSettings. Loads DATABASE_URL from environment. Provides Settings class for dependency injection.
core/database.py: SQLAlchemy database setup. Creates engine from DATABASE_URL, provides SessionLocal for request sessions, Base for model declarations. Includes init_db() for table creation.
models/user.py: User SQLAlchemy model. Fields: id (primary key), email (unique), password_hash. Used by AuthService for authentication.
services/auth_service.py: Core authentication service. Handles password hashing (bcrypt), login (returns simple token), register (creates user), and in-memory token management. Creates default test user on startup.
routes/health.py: Simple health check endpoint at /health. Returns status ok. Used for monitoring and deployment verification.
routes/auth.py: Authentication API routes. POST /api/auth/register - create new user. POST /api/auth/login - authenticate and get token. GET /api/auth/me - get current user from Bearer token. Uses Pydantic models for request/response.
agent/: AI assistance folder containing index files and endpoint definitions. Helps AI understand codebase structure for modifications.
